incentive.statement: A canonical Source choice should not leave contradictory clause settings, but convenience preselection must not invent unsupported grammar authority.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate typed Lesson 7 class evidence, Source transition behavior, editable Authority state, and focused proof.

outcome: Selecting a canonical VNC stem creates a coherent editable starter clause with evidence-bounded Class preselection.

responsibilities.statement: Compute and apply non-authorizing starter presets from the selected source record and typed Lesson 7 class profile.

actors.contribution: Prefill coherent editable controls without guessing unresolved Class or overwriting an existing transitive subtype.

responsibilities.statement: Explain that Source choices load editable starter settings rather than grammar authority.

actors.contribution: Keep the Source and Authority distinction visible.

responsibilities.statement: Prove A/B/C/D supported presets, unresolved-Class preservation, transitive-subtype preservation, direct entry, and browser behavior.

actors.contribution: Add hostile focused and live UI evidence.

responsibilities.statement: Record the bounded target and closure evidence without starting full readiness.

actors.contribution: Keep convenience preselection separate from grammar authorization.

retirements.removalEvidence: Focused and browser proof show coherent valence, supported Class preselection, transitive-subtype preservation, and unresolved-Class preservation.

evidence.result: Main UI and causative relation UI passed 397/397 assertions, including A/B/C/D rules, unresolved Class, and transitive subtype preservation.
cuā loaded Class D and specific 3sg; chīhua preserved projective-nonhuman and Class D as unresolved; chōca loaded Class A and intransitive; warning/error logs were empty.
All 160 VNC records exposed starter metadata: 76 Andrews-rule-supported Class presets and 84 unresolved preserve-current cases, with zero guessed unresolved classes.
Runtime manifest remained one browser entry with 75/75 modules/installers; architecture metrics remained at their stabilization boundaries.

closure.nextLessonEntryPoint: Select the next explicit implementation target; full readiness remains a formal handoff gate.
